arts.ttl: Fixture amendments for Matchweek 37 Premier League matches
arts.sum: *Subject to Forest's participation in the FA Cup final The list below includes the possible movement of matches involving the teams who will play the FA Cup final on Saturday 17 May, which remains an exclusive matchday with no Premier League fixtures.

arts.ttl: How to watch & follow Palace vs Bournemouth LIVE
arts.sum: Crystal Palace face Bournemouth at Selhurst Park on Saturday, 19th April (15:00 BST) – and here's how you can watch and follow the action LIVE!

arts.ttl: Talking points from Crystal Palace’s 5-0 humbling at Newcastle - Eagles collapse on the road again as they pay the penalty for missed spot kick
arts.sum: Make no mistake, these two away games at clubs that have the financial clout of City and Newcastle mean that Palace have no right to expect to win, but the form going into them suggested that they would make a much better fist of it and not concede a morale-battering 10 goals. It was a humbling evening for all concerned with Crystal Palace as they succumbed to a Newcastle United team on the crest of a wave.
